title: Epic TNT Mod
description: This mod adds over 200 different explosives to minecraft, ranging from miniature throwables to omniverse destroyers that can destroy hundreds of trillions of blocks!
body:
This mod adds over 200 different explosives to minecraft, ranging from miniature throwables to omniverse destroyers that can destroy hundreds of trillions of blocks!

Credit to olotheoriginal for optimization

Join the Official TNT Server to ask questions and find more mods to destroy your world with!

If you're a YouTuber and would like to feature my mod in a video, please leave a download link in the description, I would greatly appreciate it!

This mod includes over 180 TNT, 100 dynamites and 60 landmines to destroy your world with!

**List of all TNT:**
